name: com.abstractocclusion.webgpuwater
description: GPU water for URP: interactive ripple simulation, buoyancy and two-way coupling, surface + edge foam, GPU foam particles, caustics, god rays, and hybrid planar/SSR/sky reflections. Includes the one-window Water Wizard authoring tool (Window > AbstractOcclusion > WebGpuWater > Water Wizard).

samples.description: Example water scenes (classic pool, deep and terrain lakes, multi-lake, underwater, open water, reflections, custom object pool) plus the generated meshes, sky, and materials they depend on. Import to try WebGpuWater immediately.
